recommendations.title: K-PAX
recommendations.overview: Prot is a patient at a mental hospital who claims to be from a far away planet. His psychiatrist tries to help him, only to begin to doubt his own explanations.

recommendations.title: God's Crooked Lines
recommendations.overview: Alice Gould, a private investigator, pretends to be mentally ill in order to enter a psychiatric hospital and gather evidence for the case she is working on: the death of a patient in unclear circumstances.

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Wizard School
recommendations.overview: When Alex is caught using magic to clean her room she is forced to go to wizard school with Justin. Max and Jerry camp out on the terrace to prove their manhood.

recommendations.title: Stand Up Girl

recommendations.title: Patient Seven

recommendations.director: Rasmus Wassberg, Erlingur Thoroddsen, Johannes Persson, Dean Hewison, Paul Davis, Danny Draven, Joel Morgan, Nicholas Peterson, Ómar Örn Hauksson

recommendations.title: Let's Be Cops

recommendations.title: Jack Mimoun & the Secrets of Val Verde
recommendations.overview: Two years after surviving alone on the hostile island of Val Verde, Jack Mimoun has become an adventure star. The book recounting his experience is a bestseller and his television show breaks audience records. He is then approached by the mysterious

recommendations.title: Shutter Island
recommendations.overview: World War II soldier-turned-U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, but his efforts are compromised by troubling visions and a mysterious doctor.

recommendations.title: Comedy Central Roast of Justin Bieber
recommendations.overview: Several roasters, and the master himself Kevin Hart, make fun of Justin Bieber.
